content.text: Cloud Security Innovation!
Unveiling LG U+’s Zero Trust Strategy
Why did LG U+, one of Korea’s leading telecommunications companies, choose QueryPie?
Discover how LG U+ successfully implemented Zero Trust Architecture and security automation in a public cloud environment.
🚀 Cloud Security Engineer Daniel Ku from LG U+ shares his insights on QueryPie’s best features & use cases!
From eliminating manual security operations to automated access control and enhanced security policies, watch the full use case now.
Key Highlights
The limitations of traditional security – Is perimeter-based security becoming obsolete in the cloud era?
LG U+’s approach to Zero Trust – Automating and centralizing access control!
Key features of QueryPie – Powerful integration with AWS, GCP, Azure, Okta, HashiCorp Vault
Revolutionizing security in cloud environments – How did LG U+ enhance security while improving operational efficiency?
What’s Daniel Koo’s favorite QueryPie feature?
Why QueryPie?
Centralized access control for servers, databases, and Kubernetes
Supports OAuth & SCIM – Seamless integration with Okta, EntraID, and other global identity providers
Public Cloud Connectivity – Automatically identifies and manages cloud assets in AWS, GCP, and Azure
REST API Integration – Easily link with existing internal systems
About LGU+
LG U+ is one of South Korea’s leading telecommunications companies, providing a wide range of services, including mobile, internet, IPTV, and enterprise solutions.
It is a subsidiary of LG Corporation, a global conglomerate known for its innovation in electronics, chemicals, and telecommunications.
lguplus.com/
